title: Astel Package Manifest
description: Root contract for an .astel package manifest.json (v0). An .astel file is a ZIP archive containing this manifest plus the referenced layer/quality/export files. The manifest references files by POSIX relative path from the package root; it never inlines splat geometry. See docs/specs/manifest-v0.md.

format_version.description: SemVer string of the Astel package spec this manifest conforms to. MAJOR bump = breaking; MINOR = additive; PATCH = clarification. Readers must refuse an unknown MAJOR and must open any MINOR within a known MAJOR, ignoring unknown additive keys. See manifest-v0.md section 10.

layers.description: Ordered map of present layers l0..l7 of the Layer Stack (CLAUDE.md section 3). Absent layers are omitted entirely. Each value is a Layer Entry. The order l0->l7 is the pipeline order; layers never collapse into a single blob (binding constraint).

l1.description: L1 dense point cloud (geometric ground truth for L3 error).

l3.description: L3 refined surface gaussians (the hero layer).

l4.description: L4 appearance / lighting (per-gaussian PBR + env map).

l5.description: L5 collision & solidity (SDF, convex set, print-only isosurface, mass props).

exports.description: Records of exports generated from this package, each documenting the lossy projection applied (which layers were dropped, coordinate transform, kernel conversion). The package is the lossless source of truth; exports are honest about what they lose. See manifest-v0.md section 11.

extensions.description: Namespaced vendor extension blocks. Keys are namespaced (astel_*, vendor_*). Unknown extension blocks MUST be preserved on round-trip (forward-migration policy, section 10).

extras.description: Free-form application data, ignored by validators (glTF convention).

assetIdentity.title: Asset Identity
assetIdentity.description: Identity and provenance of the asset as a whole.

id.description: Stable unique id for the asset. UUIDv7 recommended (time-ordered).

created.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of package creation.

generator.description: Producing tool name and version, for auditable migrations.

source_modality.description: Input modality that produced this asset (CLAUDE.md section 0).

prompt.description: Original text prompt, if source_modality is text.

seed.description: Generation seed for reproducibility, if applicable.

coordinateSystem.title: Coordinate System
coordinateSystem.description: The single basis every layer and buffer lives in. Astel-native is right-handed, +Y up, -Z forward (glTF/OpenGL convention) so glTF export is identity. SH band-ge-1 coefficients must be rotated/resigned on any basis change at export (manifest-v0.md section 8).

forward_axis.description: Signed axis that points forward (away from a default camera).

meters_per_unit.description: Metres represented by one native unit. Default 1.0. Mirrors scale.meters_per_unit; the scale block carries the confidence interval.

scale.title: Metric Scale
scale.description: Metric grounding of the asset, with an honest confidence interval that may be wide (CLAUDE.md section 3 L1, section 4). Never a bare point claim.

confidence.description: Confidence interval on the scale estimate. Width communicates honesty; a wide interval is legal and expected for pure text/image inputs.

ci_low.description: Lower bound of meters_per_unit confidence interval.

ci_high.description: Upper bound of meters_per_unit confidence interval.

distribution.description: Assumed distribution shape of the estimate.

method.description: Primary method that produced the scale estimate (DECISIONS.md RA3 consensus).

sources.description: Individual estimates feeding the consensus, each weighted. Retains the original even after a user override.

user_overridden.description: True if the user manually set the scale (CLAUDE.md section 3 L1). The original estimate is retained in sources.

exportRecord.title: Export Record
exportRecord.description: One lossy projection of the Layer Stack onto an open standard. Documents exactly what was dropped so the round-trip story stays honest (manifest-v0.md section 11).

path.description: POSIX relative path to the primary exported file inside the package (or external if generated lazily).

sidecar_path.description: Relative path to the companion Astel sidecar (*.astl.json) for bare .spz/.sog exports, carrying provenance and the manifest subset.

source_layer.description: Layer id whose splats were exported (e.g. 'l3' or 'l2' for previews).

dropped_layers.description: Layer ids present in the package but not representable in this export. The .astel package retains them.

kernel_conversion.description: Kernel-type conversion applied (e.g. 2DGS surfels flattened to ellipsoids for KHR_gaussian_splatting which only defines kernel:ellipse).

coordinate_transform.description: Human/machine-readable description of the basis change applied (handedness flip, axis swap, unit scale, SH resign). Critical for engine targets (Unity LH+Y, Unreal LH+Z cm).

notes.description: Free-text honesty notes about what this export loses.
